cases.prompt: 인앱 NPS 설문이랑 앱 평점 유도 넣어줘. 별점 유도는 만족한 사람만.

assertions.text: Adds satisfaction-gated StoreKit/Play in-app review prompts fired only after a positive signal.
Routes detractors to a private channel instead of the store, frequency-capped.

cases.prompt: Add a store review prompt and an in-app survey, but don't game ratings.

assertions.text: Includes a deterministic review-prompt eligibility engine.
Distinguishes measuring sentiment from begging for 5 stars / never games ratings.
